entities.name: RICE-WHEAT CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: A production system involving the sequential cultivation of rice and wheat

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the rice-wheat cropping systems are located

entities.name: FOOD GRAIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total output of food grains from agricultural systems

entities.name: FOOD SELF-SUFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of a region to produce enough food to meet its own needs

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: TOTAL FACTOR PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: A measure of efficiency in production that accounts for all inputs

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: A group of plants used to enhance the productivity and sustainability of cropping systems

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal grain used as a primary component of the rice-wheat cropping system

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal grain used as a primary component of the rice-wheat cropping system

entities.name: HIGH-YIELDING
entities.description: The characteristic of producing a large amount of crop per unit area

entities.name: SHORT-DURATION
entities.description: The characteristic of completing the growth cycle in a short period

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability to maintain production levels without degrading the environment

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE BASE
entities.description: The environmental assets required for agricultural production
